name: CoinGecko
description: Real-time and historical cryptocurrency market data including prices, market cap, volume, and trending coins for 10,000+ cryptocurrencies.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: CoinGecko provides comprehensive real-time and historical cryptocurrency market data for 10,000+ coins across 600+ exchanges. Access prices, market cap, trading volume, OHLCV data, trending coins, and global market statistics. **Free tier** is available with rate limits. Get an API key at [CoinGecko API](https://www.coingecko.com/en/api).

x-cg-demo-api-key.description: CoinGecko Demo API key for authentication (leave empty for unauthenticated access with lower rate limits)

tools.name: Get Coin Prices
tools.description: Get the current price of one or more cryptocurrencies in any supported fiat or crypto currency

ids.description: Comma-separated list of coin IDs (e.g., 'bitcoin,ethereum,solana'). Use Get Coin List to find IDs.

vs_currencies.description: Comma-separated list of target currencies (e.g., 'usd,eur,btc'). Use Get Supported Currencies to list options.

include_market_cap.description: Include market capitalization in the response

include_24hr_vol.description: Include 24-hour trading volume in the response

include_24hr_change.description: Include 24-hour price change percentage in the response

include_last_updated_at.description: Include last updated timestamp in the response

precision.description: Decimal precision for price values (e.g., 'full' or a number 0-18)

tools.name: Get Coins Markets
tools.description: List all supported coins with price, market cap, volume, and market-related data sorted by market cap

ids.description: Comma-separated list of coin IDs to filter results (e.g., 'bitcoin,ethereum'). Omit for all coins.

precision.description: Decimal precision for price values (e.g., 'full' or a number 0-18)

tools.name: Get Coin Details
tools.description: Get comprehensive current data for a specific coin: name, price, market data, community stats, developer data, and more

id.description: CoinGecko coin ID (e.g., 'bitcoin', 'ethereum', 'solana'). Use Get Coin List to find IDs.

localization.description: Include localized language data in the response

market_data.description: Include market data (price, volume, market cap)

community_data.description: Include community stats (Twitter followers, Reddit subscribers)

developer_data.description: Include developer stats (GitHub forks, stars, commits)

tools.name: Get Coin Market Chart
tools.description: Get historical market data (prices, market cap, volume) for a coin over a specified time range

interval.description: Data interval: 'daily' for daily data. Leave empty for auto-granularity (hourly for <=90 days, daily for >90 days).

precision.description: Decimal precision for price values (e.g., 'full' or a number 0-18)

tools.name: Get Coin Historical Data
tools.description: Get historical data (price, market cap, volume) for a coin on a specific date

tools.name: Get Coin OHLCV
tools.description: Get Open, High, Low, Close (OHLCV) candlestick data for a coin

days.description: Number of days: 1, 7, 14, 30, 90, 180, 365. Candle interval: 30min (1d), 4hr (7-30d), 4 days (>30d).

precision.description: Decimal precision for price values (e.g., 'full' or a number 0-18)

tools.name: Get Trending Coins
tools.description: Get the top 7 trending coins on CoinGecko in the last 24 hours, based on search volume

tools.name: Get Global Crypto Market Data
tools.description: Get global cryptocurrency market data including total market cap, volume, BTC dominance, and active cryptocurrencies count

tools.name: Get Coin List
tools.description: Get a list of all supported coins with their IDs, names, and symbols. Use this to find the correct coin ID for other endpoints.

include_platform.description: Include platform contract addresses (e.g., Ethereum ERC-20 addresses)

tools.name: Get Supported Currencies
tools.description: Get a list of all supported fiat and crypto currencies that can be used as target currencies (vs_currency)

tools.name: Search Coins
tools.description: Search for coins, categories, and markets by keyword

tools.name: Get Exchanges List
tools.description: List all supported exchanges with volume, trust scores, and trading pairs

tools.name: Get Exchange Details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific exchange including volume, trust score, and supported trading pairs

id.description: Exchange ID (e.g., 'binance', 'coinbase', 'kraken'). Use Get Exchanges List to find IDs.
